MODULE: cosmos.os_integration.agentic_os
FILE: cosmos/os_integration/agentic_os.py (72 lines)
CATEGORY: os_integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Agentic OS Bridge - Advanced System Control.

"I am the master of my process, the captain of my kernel."

This module enables deep OS-level monitoring and control (Process management, 
System stats, and Shell automation with safety).

CLASSES:
- AgenticOSBridge
  Methods: def get_system_load(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def list_processes(self, filter_name: Optional[str]=None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: async def execute_shell_command(self, cmd: str, timeout: int=30) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def get_network_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
